stimulus: A group of marine biologists has located an unusually pristine coral reef in a remote section of the Indian Ocean. The corals are so well preserved that the team has been able to ______blank detailed information about the organisms living on the reef, including the species composition and the relationships among predators and prey.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice A is the best answer because "gather" means to collect or acquire, which fits the context of biologists assembling detailed information from a well-preserved reef. Choice B is incorrect because "conceal" means to hide, the opposite of the discovery the text describes. Choice C is incorrect because "occupy" means to inhabit or engage; information is not inhabited. Choice D is incorrect because "withhold" means to keep back, but the text describes researchers obtaining information, not restricting it.
